description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a dark, gabled roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The structure is surrounded by a paved driveway and walkways, with neatly manicured lawns and several mature trees providing shade and greenery. The facade features a combination of large windows and a central entrance, giving the home a welcoming appearance. The roof extends over the porch, creating a sheltered outdoor space. The property is bordered by low curbs, separating the green areas from the paved surfaces. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, front porch, large windows, and surrounding lawns and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the house, additional windows, and more visible trees.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back facade, lawn, and less prominent entrance features.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the porch extension, side windows, and spacious lawn area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
